home.title: Settings
home.subtitle: Everything that defines your restaurant in one place. Configure identity, team, devices and integrations.

legalEntities.label: Legal Entities
legalEntities.description: Tax data and legal company details.

check.locationDesc: Address and timezone of the unit.

field.panelLanguageHint: This language changes the administrative panel. TPV language is configured below.

people.description: Create people (staff/managers) to operate the restaurant.
people.noRestaurant: Select or create a restaurant to manage people.
people.emptyState: No people yet. Use the form above to add.

error.codeGenFailed: Could not generate a unique code. Try again.

publicPage.title: Public page
publicPage.description: These fields appear on the restaurant's public page.
publicPage.saved: Saved. The public page will be updated.
publicPage.notConfigured: Complete the restaurant setup to edit.

perception.cameraCheckDesc: Use "Watch live" to confirm the camera is active.

locations.title: Locations
locations.subtitle: Add, edit, or group your restaurant locations to keep operations organised.
locations.emptyState: No locations yet. Use the button below to add the first one.

ubicaciones.title: Locations
ubicaciones.subtitle: Address, tables and zones of the restaurant.
ubicaciones.tablesPlaceholder: Table and zone management will be implemented here. For now, use the /operations route to view tables.
ubicaciones.onlinePresenceDesc: Public address and hours are managed on the Web page.
ubicaciones.qrCodesDesc: Menu and table QR codes are managed on the Web page.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.subtitle: Delivery hours and coverage zones.
delivery.zonasDesc: Delivery zone and coverage radius configuration. In phase 2.
delivery.qrLink: QR codes and online presence → Web page

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.subtitle: GloriaFood, Glovo, Uber Eats, Deliveroo — enable/disable per adapter.
delivery.comingSoonMessage: This integration is under development. It will be available in a future update.

gloriafood.description: Receive GloriaFood orders directly in TPV. Automatically sync your menu.

glovo.description: Glovo integration for order intake and delivery tracking.

ubereats.description: Receive Uber Eats orders and manage status directly from ChefIApp.

deliveroo.description: Deliveroo integration for centralized delivery order management.

hub.title: Integrations
hub.subtitle: Connect TPV, delivery and other services to your restaurant.

payments.label: Payments
payments.description: Stripe and others; config, status and logs.

webhooks.label: APIs & Webhooks
webhooks.description: Webhooks OUT (endpoint, events); API IN (keys, limits).

delivery.label: Delivery
delivery.description: GloriaFood, Glovo, Uber Eats; enable/disable per adapter.

google-business.label: Google Business
google-business.description: Profile, reviews and replies from Google Business Profile.

instagram.label: Instagram
instagram.description: Automatic publishing of dishes and promotions.

reservas.title: Reservations
reservas.subtitle: Availability, guarantee, shifts, messages and reminders.

resumen.title: Reservations summary
resumen.desc: Central reservation settings. Use the tabs for Availability, Guarantee, Shifts and Messages.

disponibilidad.title: Availability
disponibilidad.desc: Hours and capacity per day and location. Phase 2: calendar and limits.

garantia.title: Guarantee & Cancellation
garantia.desc: Deposits, no-show charges, cancellation policies. Phase 2.

turnos.title: Shifts
turnos.desc: Shift duration and time blocks. Phase 2.

mensajes.title: Messages & Reminders
mensajes.desc: Email and SMS templates for confirmation and reminders. Phase 2.

webPage.title: Restaurant web page
webPage.subtitle: Manage online presence: public URL, contact details, QR codes.
webPage.urlDesc: This is the restaurant's public web page that customers can visit. Share the link or print the QR code.
webPage.noSlug: Set the restaurant slug in Config → General to have a public URL.
webPage.slugHint: The slug is the name in the URL (e.g. /public/my-restaurant).

devices.title: Devices
devices.subtitle: Provision terminals, monitor status, and download software.

install.title: Install device
install.desc: Generate a QR code and scan it on the device to link it automatically to this restaurant. The code expires in 5 minutes.

active.title: Active devices
active.desc: Terminals registered in this restaurant. The coloured dot indicates the last activity.
active.empty: No registered devices. Use the QR above to link the first one.

download.title: Download software
download.desc: Operational modules (TPV, KDS, AppStaff) only work as installed applications — they are not accessible via browser. Download the appropriate app and link it with the QR above.

distribution.title: Distribution policy
distribution.text: The admin panel (this screen) is the only part of ChefIApp accessible via browser. Operational modules — TPV, KDS, and AppStaff — require the dedicated application (desktop or mobile).

installQR.iosStep1: Open the Camera app on iPhonePhone
installQR.iosNote: If it opens in another browser by mistake, go back and repeat selecting Safari.

legalEntities.title: Legal Entities
legalEntities.subtitle: Define the legal entity responsible for the restaurant for tax, billing, and compliance purposes.

main.title: Main legal entity
main.subtitle: Who is the company or person legally responsible for billing and tax documents.
main.fiscalAddressPlaceholder: Street, number, postal code, city, country
main.warningMessage: Changing these details affects invoices and tax reports. Confirm?

usage.title: Entity usage
usage.subtitle: Where this legal entity is used. One entity can be used in one or more locations.

extras.title: Additional tax details
extras.subtitle: Optional. Tax footer text on receipts, legal reference (e.g. trade registry). Internal notes do not appear on receipts.

locationMap.title: Location assignment
locationMap.subtitle: Which legal entity is used in each location. Supports franchises, multi-company, and groups.
locationMap.empty: No locations found. Create locations in Settings → Locations.
locationMap.noEntityWarning: Set the main legal entity in the first card so it is associated with locations.

closures.title: Temporary closures
closures.subtitle: Pause online orders, reservations, or deliveries for specific dates.

create.title: New temporary closure
create.errorDateRequired: Please provide start and end date and time.
create.errorEndBeforeStart: The end date/time must be after the start.

promotions.title: Promotions & rewards
promotions.subtitle: Set up discounts, loyalty points, and automatic offers for your customers. Simple for the team, powerful for the business.

discounts.title: Discounts
discounts.subtitle: Define manual discounts that can be applied in TPV by operators.

pointsPerOrder.title: Points per bill
pointsPerOrder.subtitle: Fixed points assigned for each closed bill/table, regardless of amount.

pointsPerEuro.title: Points per spend
pointsPerEuro.subtitle: Define how many points the customer earns for each euro spent.

auto.title: Automatic promotions
auto.subtitle: Associate discounts to specific channels (web, QR, delivery) so offers are applied automatically.
auto.emptyDiscountsHint: Create discounts in the “Discounts” section above to associate them per channel.

marcas.title: Brands
marcas.subtitle: Main brand and sub-brands of the restaurant.

main.title: Main brand
main.subtitle: Name and description of the restaurant’s main brand.

sub.title: Sub-brands
sub.subtitle: Secondary or virtual brands associated with the restaurant.
sub.empty: No sub-brands yet. Add one using the + button.

card.title: Locations
card.empty: No locations. Add the first one with the + button.

groupsCard.title: Location groups
groupsCard.empty: There are no groups yet. Create one to group locations (e.g. Ibiza, Franchises).

groupModal.emptyLocations: Create at least one location first.

modal.addressPlaceholder: Street, number, postal code, city, country

usuarios.title: Admin Users
usuarios.subtitle: Owners, managers, and permissions. Phase 2: invitations and roles per location.
usuarios.adminTableDesc: Users with owner or manager access to the portal.
usuarios.emptyState: In phase 2, you will be able to invite administrators and assign roles per location.

generalCardIdentity.title: Restaurant Identity
generalCardIdentity.subtitle: Who we are and where to find us.

errors.coreUnavailable: Core unavailable or no restaurant selected.

generalCardLocale.title: Language and locale (operational)
generalCardLocale.subtitle: Which language and time/currency context the POS uses at this location.

errors.coreUnavailable: Core unavailable or no restaurant selected.

generalCardReceipt.title: Tax / receipt text
generalCardReceipt.subtitle: Optional information shown on printed receipts (tax data, thanks note, returns policy).

placeholders.extraInfo: E.g. VAT ID B-12345678. Thank you for your visit.

errors.coreUnavailable: Core unavailable or no restaurant selected.

confirms.revokeApiKey: Revoke this key? Calls using it will stop working.

header.title: APIs & Webhooks
header.subtitle: Webhooks OUT (endpoint, events); API IN (keys, limits).

webhooksOut.title: Webhooks OUT
webhooksOut.empty: No webhooks configured. Click "Add webhook" to send events (order.created, order.paid, etc.) to a URL with HMAC signature.

apiIn.title: API IN (keys)
apiIn.keyCreatedHint: Copy this key now; it will not be shown again.

form.secretHint: Store this secret; it will not be shown again. Header: X-ChefIApp-Signature: sha256=<hex>

softwareTpvPage.title: POS Software
softwareTpvPage.subtitle: General setup and quick mode for the point of sale.

config.title: Configuration
config.description: POS preferences: language, currency, and close behavior.
config.confirmOnClose: Ask for confirmation when closing shift

quick.title: Quick mode
quick.description: Shortcuts and fast flow for peak service (bar, terrace).

errors.coreUnavailable: Core unavailable or no restaurant selected.

printersPage.title: Printers
printersPage.subtitle: Printers and print routes by order type or category.

table.empty: No printers yet. Add one with the + button.

routes.title: Print routes
routes.description: Choose which printer receives each order type or category.
routes.empty: No routes yet. Add printers first, then create routes.
